title: Hostile Neural Industrialization
description: Hostile Neural Networks meets Modern Industrialization — Upgrade your Neural Network with integrated machines and multiblocks!
body:
![An example setup using all machines and multiblocks](https://imgur.com/Xgm3YQJ.png)
<font size="2">Requires [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization), [Hostile Neural Networks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hostile-neural-networks), [Tesseract API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tesseract-api) and [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge). You likely already have most of these!</font>

**Hostile Neural Industrialization** closes off one of [Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization)'s blind spots: mob farming. By harnessing [Hostile Neural Networks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hostile-neural-networks)'s mechanics, you'll be able to fully automate mob loot with ease. **_The Neural Network must grow_**.


# Features
- MI-styled sidegrades for HNN's **Simulation Chamber** and **Loot Fabricator**
- Those same two machines in multiblock form for your extreme resource farming desires
- Recipe Viewer (EMI, JEI, REI) support
- Full in-game documentation
- [Rich, modpack maker friendly configs and KubeJS support!](https://github.com/Luligabi1/HostileNeuralIndustrialization/wiki)
